temporal_description:
A medium shot shows a man in a white shirt and black tie standing in what appears to be an office or control room. He has a concerned and intense expression as he speaks. To his left, an older-style CRT monitor displays a grainy, black-and-white security camera feed, showing a figure in a suit. The time "16:15" is visible on the monitor. In the background, the back of another person's head is visible on the right, and a doorway is on the far right. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner. The audio features a tense and confrontational dialogue between two men in what sounds like an office or interrogation room. The first man speaks with a firm, slightly agitated voice, stating, "现在黄警司死了，就和我们重案组有关系。" (Now that Superintendent Wong is dead, it has something to do with our Major Crime Squad.) His tone is serious and insistent, as if he is making a crucial point in a heated discussion.

The camera cuts to a close-up of two men sitting side-by-side. The man on the left, in a police uniform with epaulets, looks forward with a serious, slightly furrowed brow. The man on the right, the same one from the previous shot, looks down with a somber and contemplative expression. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. The second man responds with a sharp, accusatory voice, his pitch rising in disbelief and anger. "你这是什么态度啊？" (What kind of attitude is that?) he exclaims, his voice filled with frustration and a demand for respect.

The shot returns to the first man, who is now gesturing with his right hand as he continues to speak with an animated and serious look. The security camera footage and the time "16:15" are still visible on the monitor beside him. The "风行网" watermark is still in place. The first man begins to reply, "黄警司..." but is cut off before he can finish his thought. The background is quiet, with no music or significant sound effects, placing all the focus on the intense verbal exchange.
